title: 荣誉附件正文｜LOA Combine（第10部分）
content:
tended to support and contributes to meeting the deliverables. PIs are to ensure that there are sufficient funds to support the conference. No virement of budget to this vote is allowed.

Support for overseas collaborators, visiting researchers and visiting students are NOT allowed. PIs and / or his / her research staff hired under the grant are required to submit the completed travel request form to TL office at least 4 weeks prior to the actual conference date. TL Conference Request Approval PIs can approve their research staff’s conference attendance requests up to S$5,000. Any amount above S$5,000 will be routed to TL Director for approval • Requests by Research Staff (up to S$5,000) approval by PI Completed request form PI approves (according to TL guidelines) to TL office for checking and record keeping (4 weeks before conference date) conference registration All PIs’ conference attendance requests are to be approved by TL Director. • Requests by PIs and Research Staff (above S$5,000) approval by TL Director Completed request form PI supports (only for researchers’ requests of amount above S$5,000) TL Office for clearance (4 weeks before conference date) TL Director approval conference registration PIs and research staff are required to complete the request form (TL Travel Request Form, use the latest version), justify the need to travel for the conference and submit any relevant documents to support the request. PIs are to ensure that there are sufficient funds to support the travel. No virement of budget to this vote is allowed. PIs and research staff are to proceed with bookings and registrations only after approval is granted. Should the actual expenditures exceed the approved sum, PIs and research staff can only claim up to the approved amount. Temasek Laboratories @ SUTD Page 6 Circular – Temasek Lab Grants Date: April 2018 Type of Description Expenses The PIs must submit a copy of the approved Travel Request Form, conference trip report (including lessons learnt and recommendations) and other supporting documents stated on the form within 2 weeks upon return when claiming reimbursement of the expenses. Local conference attendance fees for PI and researchers to be funded by the Conference Travel vote. Local conference attendance fees for PI and researchers to be funded by the Conference Travel vote. Failure to comply with any of the requirements may result in the claims being rejected. The management reserves the right to recover any disbursed claim from the claimant. OOE Related Expenses Audit Fees Not allowable This includes both internal and external audit fees. Bank Charges Allowable As long as it is specifically related to the payments for consumables and equipment purchased with the grant and meant for research purposes. Books and Allowable Specialised Journals Only if the books, lab manuals and specialised journals are directly related to the research that the grant is intended to support and are not already available in the University Library. The funding for journal subscription would be restricted to the duration of the grant. Books and specialised journals purchased with the grant must be properly tagged by the Library.
